mapper.select: INSERT INTO tb_post (board_id, title, content, created_by, modified_by, created_date, modified_date) VALUES (#{boardId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{createdBy}, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW()) RETURNING post_id
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy}, modified_date = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
